src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer JHipster versions.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3.
Replace the legacy Hibernate5Module with Hibernate5JakartaModule to support Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3 and Java 17+ compatibility.
Replace deprecated Spring Boot Liquibase setter with the new API method to maintain compatibility with updated Spring Boot versions.
Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with functional SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ / 6.0+ API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with modern Spring Security method security configuration.
Migrate from antMatchers to requestMatchers in HttpSecurity configuration to use the new functional authorization API.
Switch from custom SecurityProblemSupport to standard BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler for OAuth2 resource server compatibility.
Configure HttpSecurity to act as an OAuth2 Resource Server with JWT support, replacing the custom JWTConfigurer adapter.
Refactor header configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL for Content Security Policy, Frame Options, and Permissions Policy.
Replace the explicit CorsFilter injection with a SpaWebFilter added after BasicAuthenticationFilter, adapting to the new filter chain structure.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
